steps.title: Identify the rhetorical constraint
steps.content: The audience is unfamiliar with Angkor Wat. The answer must introduce what Angkor Wat is while presenting Tan's research and discovery clearly.

steps.title: Match the constraint to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C introduces Angkor Wat as a Cambodian temple while explaining that Tan used a technique to reveal hundreds of images—effectively orienting an unfamiliar audience while highlighting the research's significance.

The other choices either skip introducing Angkor Wat or bury the discovery under irrelevant details.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
